value: I'm sorry you're having trouble with your driver—that's definitely frustrating when someone isn't familiar with the route. A few things that might help right now: you can share your exact address or pin in the app to make navigation clearer, or if you'd prefer, you can cancel this ride and request a new one. If you've already completed the trip and were charged for a longer route than necessary, let me know and we can look into adjusting that for you.
